GenAiFunction.description: 1 - Get the challenges corresponding for the criteria given, and share the details 2 - If you don't get any results, ask to the users to give you more details about the challenge by proposing the inputs possible 3 - if the challenge retreived is in status Draft, always say that the challenge is under definition for now 4 - If the challenge retreived is in status ToStart, always say that the challenge is not started and share the start date 5 - If the challenge retreived is in status OnGoing, always give the remaining days 6 - if the challenge retreived is in status Cancelled, always says to ask to the manager to get more info 7 - if the challenge retreived is in status Finished, always give the results
